sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ أَمْسِ لِأَشْتَرِيَ دَوَاءً لِلصُّدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam otišao u apoteku da kupim lijek za glavobolju.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the pharmacy yesterday to buy medicine for a headache.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ لِي الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ كَيْفِيَّةَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الدَّوَاءِ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut mi je objasnio kako da pravilno koristim lijek.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist explained to me how to use the medicine correctly.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلْتُ الدَّوَاءَ بَعْدَ الْغَدَاءِ وَشَعَرْتُ بِتَحَسُّنٍ سَرِيعٍ.
sentences.translation: Popio sam lijek nakon ručka i osjetio brzo poboljšanje.
sentences.translationEn: I took the medicine after lunch and felt a quick improvement.
